name: Champagne
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Frozen white grape juice concentrate (6 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the club soda or seltzer and thawed grape juice concentrate.
2. Pour the mixture into two soda bottles.
3. Cap tightly and chill.
Serves 8 to 10.
Per serving: 30 cal; 0 prot; 0 fat; 7 g carb; 0 chol; 29 mg sod; 0 fiber; vegan
Source: Vegetarian Times, Jan 94/MM by DEEANNE
